title: Authorize downward source-route tunnels
description: Define how an egress authenticates that a source-route tunnel was authorized by the active DODAG root. Bind root identity, outer route, inner source/destination, selected prefix, and replay state so any authenticated mesh node cannot use an egress as unauthorized transit.
acceptance_criteria: Egress verifies authorized root tunnel provenance and delegated prefix before decapsulation; forged root, inner-source spoof, replay, route substitution, and unauthorized transit tests fail closed.
notes: Blocked on protocol design. Existing spec 05-routing 8.9 and draft 7.4 define IPv6-in-IPv6/SRH and delegated-prefix checks, but no tunnel authentication wire field, signature transcript/domain, replay sequence representation/persistence, or active-root key provisioning/rotation at egress. Rust has only bare SourceRoutingHeader codec and no tunnel encapsulation/decapsulation implementation. Need approval of an authenticated root tunnel envelope before implementation; inventing one would create incompatible wire behavior.
